briefing: NASDAQ +1.3% and S&P 500 +0.8% deliver a solid risk-on session, clearing the threshold to deploy idle cash. CHRN is the only candidate meeting all four multi-signal confirmation criteria (MACD crossover, RSI 55–70, price above SMA-20, volume surge) and carries the highest composite score of 100, making it the clear choice. All six existing positions remain healthy with no stop-loss or profit-target triggers evident, so no sells are warranted today.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means waiting until several independent technical indicators all point in the same direction before entering a trade. Rather than buying on a single signal (like RSI alone), requiring agreement from MACD, RSI, price-vs-SMA, and volume reduces false entries and increases the probability that a move has real momentum behind it. CHRN's score of 100 today reflects exactly this — five separate signals all aligned bullishly.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重訊號確認，是指在進場買股前，等待多個獨立技術指標同時指向同一方向。相比僅靠單一指標（如RSI）就出手，要求MACD、RSI、均線位置與成交量四者同步確認，能有效降低假突破的風險，提高捕捉真實動能的勝率。今日CHRN獲得滿分100，正是因為五項訊號全部同步看多，是教科書式的多重訊號確認案例。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities advanced broadly on July 10, with the NASDAQ leading at +1.3% as technology and growth names extended their recent momentum. Risk appetite strengthened following continued resilience in labor market data and easing concerns around near-term Fed policy moves, allowing investors to rotate back into higher-beta sectors. The broad-based advance — with both large-cap (S&P 500 +0.8%) and growth indices rising in tandem — signals institutional participation rather than a narrow speculative squeeze.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市7月10日普遍上漲，那斯達克指數領漲，升幅達1.3%，科技與成長型股票延續近期升勢。勞動市場數據持續穩健，加上市場對聯準會短期政策走向的憂慮有所緩解，帶動風險偏好回升，資金重新流入高貝塔板塊。標普500指數同步上漲0.8%，大型股與成長股齊升，顯示此輪行情有機構資金參與支撐，並非單純投機性拉升。

trades.reasoning: Top-scored candidate (100) with all five bullish signals confirmed: RSI in momentum zone, MACD crossover, rising histogram, price above SMA-20, and volume surge — the strongest multi-signal setup in today's screener on a risk-on day with $677 in deployable cash.
